query: SELECT id, title, slotDate, startTime, endTime, maxParticipants, currentParticipants, isAvailable, DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) as dow, DAYNAME(slotDate) as dayName FROM scheduleSlots WHERE programId IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE type = 'clinic_105') ORDER BY slotDate ASC LIMIT 30;
